F0.rationale: Baseline hygiene remains PM/floor-owned and presence-only. ACP has Bun, ignore hygiene, AGENTS routing, and a declared secret scan, but no root README and no materialized hook.

P0.rationale: ACP is the operator/gateway/workflow control-plane repo; a local verify and enforced handoff gate are preconditions for every deeper guard.

S1.rationale: ACP owns authority-bearing workflow, route, dispatch, and persistence boundaries; illegal states should be modeled at workflow definitions and route admission points rather than left to prose.

S2.rationale: The 18-package Bun workspace has repeated package, route, CLI, and store shapes; pattern dominance exists but scaffolds would lower agent construction error.

S3.rationale: Agents enter through AGENTS.md and current specs, but the disclosure surface is large and has no link/staleness guard.

S3.affordanceGating.rationale: ACP hosts gateways and prompt-adjacent control surfaces; unlike HRC, it does expose and route capabilities where stale affordance disclosure can mislead agents.

S4.rationale: Boundary and manifest guards are already in the verify path; their failure messages should teach fix/why/exception rather than emit bare violation lists.

S5.rationale: The repo has lint suppressions and structural guards; blanket or unexplained suppressions should cost attention through a reviewed exception channel.

S6.rationale: ACP is local-first infrastructure; the handoff gate is the local verify chain enforced by hooks, not a remote PR service.

S7.rationale: ACP exposes CLI, HTTP, capability, and gateway surfaces; conformance tests exist, but public surface and docs drift need explicit freshness probes.

S8.rationale: The existing guard set is small enough to keep adding rules deliberately; future guard growth should keep a written rule/why/exception cut line.

TA.rationale: ACP's core product is role-scoped workflow execution; role authorization and separation of duties are first-class correctness properties here.

TB.rationale: Gateway, server, Discord, workflow, and managed-resource work relies on documented procedures that agents must be able to invoke without re-explanation.

TC.rationale: ACP accumulates cross-gateway and workflow lessons but has no local enablement changelog or harvesting carrier.

TD.rationale: A large 18-package control-plane repo needs executable discovery for entry points, route ownership, package boundaries, and command surfaces.

TD.selfDescribingSurfaceConformance.rationale: The installed acp CLI and HTTP routes are agent-facing control surfaces; stale help or prose command inventories would cause incorrect actions.

TE.rationale: Workflow and gateway behavior already use conformance suites and real smoke rules as requirements; this is central to ACP correctness.

TF.rationale: ACP is explicitly a control plane over sessions, inputs, jobs, wrkf task facades, runs, effects, and gateway deliveries.
